entry.title: Wireframe libraries / tools for MDK apps
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am interested in experimenting with wireframing for MDK applications, specifically for iOS devices. Currently, I can access the Figma library for the BTP SDK for iOS Native SDK(https://experience.sap.com/fiori-design-ios/article/design-kit-24-4/) , but I'm unable to find similar resources for MDK SDK controls. Given that MDK utilizes the BTP SDK for iOS to generate controls, yet not all SDK controls are available in MDK, what would you recommend as the best approach to wireframing for MDK apps where there are limited controls and properties available?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: How to refresh or reload a page or explicitly call onLoad method Programatically in offline mode MDK
entry.content:
In MDK app I have a SideMenuDrawer and few menu items loaded into that. The menu items are pages and one of the menu items is set to "Status" which is clickable and based on the value of status changes, the pages which contain the list will load the appropriate entity set. So basically when the app loads pageA loads entitysetA1 considering the default value of status, now when I open the drawer and click the status its value got changed. PageA is already loaded so nothing gets refreshed. Now from the side menu if I open the pageB it will load with updated entitysetB1.Now again I open pageA it will load the list with entitysetA1 only. Now if i again click on the status it should pageA and pageB should load the entity set accordingly. I have created a rule for updating the entityset it works fine if i reopen the app after removing it from background. Bt when i am using the app nothing works accordingly. 

Now is there any way to refresh the page or any other option to resolve this issue.

entry.title: MDK offline Navigation
entry.content:
Hello expert, I am currently having a problem with displaying data for my components. When I try to implement navigation from Mequipment set to Mymeasuringpoints, it isn't showing anything

MyEquipmentList:
{

    "Controls": [
        {
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            },
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectTable",
                    "Target": {
                        "Service": "/pmp_smart_pm/Services/zpm_odata.service",
                        "EntitySet": "MEquipmentSet"
                    },
                    "_Name": "SectionObjectTable0",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "ObjectCell": {
                        "ContextMenu": {
                            "Items": [],
                            "PerformFirstActionWithFullSwipe": true,
                            "LeadingItems": [],
                            "TrailingItems": []
                        },
                        "Title": "{Eqktu}",
                        "Footnote": "{Equnr}",
                        "DisplayDescriptionInMobile": true,
                        "PreserveIconStackSpacing": false,
                        "AccessoryType": "None",
                        "Tags": [],
                        "AvatarStack": {
                            "Avatars": [],
                            "ImageIsCircular": false,
                            "ImageHasBorder": false
                        },
                        "AvatarGrid": {
                            "Avatars": [],
                            "ImageIsCircular": false
                        },
                        "OnPress": "/pmp_smart_pm/Actions/MyEquipments/NavToEquipmentDetail.action",
                        "Selected": false
                    },
                    "DataPaging": {
                        "ShowLoadingIndicator": false,
                        "PageSize": 50
                    },
                    "HighlightSelectedItem": false,
                    "Selection": {
                        "ExitOnLastDeselect": true,
                        "LongPressToEnable": "None",
                        "Mode": "None"
                    }
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "MyEquipmentList",
    "Caption": "MyEquipmentList",
    "PrefersLargeCaption": true
}

MyEquipmentDetail:
{
    "Controls": [
        {
            "FilterFeedbackBar": {
                "ShowAllFilters": false,
                "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar"
            },
            "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable",
            "_Name": "SectionedTable0",
            "Sections": [
                {
                    "ObjectHeader": {
                        "Footnote": "{Equnr}",
                        "Description": "{WorkCenter}",
                        "DetailImage": "sap-icon://machine",
                        "DetailImageIsCircular": false,
                        "HeadlineText": "{Eqktu}",
                        "StatusPosition": "Stacked",
                        "StatusImagePosition": "Leading",
                        "SubstatusImagePosition": "Leading"
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectHeader",
                    "_Name": "SectionObjectHeader0",
                    "Visible": true
                },
                {
                    "Header": {
                        "_Type": "SectionCommon.Type.Header",
                        "_Name": "SectionHeader0",
                        "AccessoryType": "None",
                        "UseTopPadding": true,
                        "Caption": "Puntos de medida"
                    },
                    "Separators": {
                        "TopSectionSeparator": false,
                        "BottomSectionSeparator": true,
                        "HeaderSeparator": true,
                        "FooterSeparator": true,
                        "ControlSeparator": true
                    },
                    "_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectTable",
                    "Target": {
                        "Service": "/pmp_smart_pm/Services/zpm_odata.service",
                        "EntitySet": "{{#Property:@odata.readLink}}/EquipmentNavToMeasuaringPoint"
                    },
                    "_Name": "SectionObjectTable1",
                    "Visible": true,
                    "EmptySection": {
                        "Caption": "No tiene puntos de medida",
                        "FooterVisible": false
                    },
                    "ObjectCell": {
                        "ContextMenu": {
                            "Items": [],
                            "PerformFirstActionWithFullSwipe": true,
                            "LeadingItems": [],
                            "TrailingItems": []
                        },
                        "Title": "{Pttxt}",
                        "DisplayDescriptionInMobile": true,
                        "PreserveIconStackSpacing": true,
                        "AccessoryType": "None",
                        "Tags": [],
                        "AvatarStack": {
                            "Avatars": [],
                            "ImageIsCircular": true,
                            "ImageHasBorder": false
                        },
                        "AvatarGrid": {
                            "Avatars": [],
                            "ImageIsCircular": false
                        },
                        "Selected": false
                    },
                    "DataPaging": {
                        "ShowLoadingIndicator": false,
                        "PageSize": 50
                    },
                    "HighlightSelectedItem": false,
                    "Selection": {
                        "ExitOnLastDeselect": true,
                        "LongPressToEnable": "None",
                        "Mode": "None"
                    }
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "_Type": "Page",
    "_Name": "EquipmentDetail",
    "Caption": "EquipmentDetail",
    "PrefersLargeCaption": true
}
Initialiaze Action:
   {
            "AutomaticallyRetrievesStreams": false,
            "Name": "Equipment",
            "Query": "MEquipmentSet?$expand=EquipmentNavToMeasuaringPoint"
        },

entry.title: Enable FaceID for successfactors mobile app
entry.content:
Hi, would love to hear from the community how to activate FaceID for success factors mobile app? 

Mobile password and fingerprint is enabled on the instance.  On Android device, there is option under app settings to enable fingerprint. However, there isnt a similar in iOS. 

Thank you!

entry.title: I can't create a MDK Project
entry.content:
Hello community, how are you? Thanks for the help. I am trying to create an MDK project from the wizard template and I get the following error:

Does anyone know why this happens? The error is generated specifically when I select my application in "Application Id"

entry.title: Getting Connection failed when we enter userId and Password in Mobile App sap b1 Android .
entry.content:
Dear Team Please Help me out i am getting stucked i have passed the B1DI, B1SL and JDBC Connection in integration framework sap business one , then i went to Tools> Troubleshhoting and tested for mobile android and i get green icon that shows it passed . Next to that i have generated certificate from tools > certificate tools and generated certificate for my domain. next imported it in my phone.

Now when i am trying to login with following credntials :-

and Getting the following error:-

entry.title: How to download a file (LargeBinary) in a MDK application?
entry.content:
Hello community, thanks for your help. I have an MDK application, I need to download a file that is converted into binaries (in the CAP service the entity column is of type LargeBinary). I have this:

When the user presses the "Download Attachment" button, I need the download to start. How can I do that? I have created a rule but it doesn't work...

On the other hand, I don't know if my approach is correct, since in the step where the user uploads the file I use the "Attachment" control and in the "AttachmentActionType" section I only allow the "SelectFile" option. And I link the file with this column that I mentioned earlier.

The save button has an OData action:

Also, the "Attachment" control allows you to upload more than one file and I only want to limit it to one, I don't know how to do that. Any recommendations are welcome.

entry.title: Create an offline mobile app using successfactors odata api
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm trying to an offline mobile application using SAP SuccessFactors OData API and I've been facing some problems to retrieve the data.

I've done all the configuration settings inside mobile cockpit, I can get the metadata from MBT URL generated by Mobile Connectivity configuration, I also can retrieve the data. But when I open the app, I can't see the data there, just an empty table.

I've tried to use offline data store and http rest connection, didn't work.

I've been seeing some videos, but everyone uses the sample odata service provided by Mobile Sample OData ESPM feature. I've tried government's public odata and I can retrieve. There is something wrong I must have been doing.

I appreciate if someone could share any tutorial about how to create a Mobile Connectivity and use it in the SAP MDK.

entry.title: MDK Inline Signature Capture file size
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm curious to know if there is a way to manage the size of a signature file created with the InlineSignatureCapture control in the SAP MDK. I'm currently working on an app but the output of the signature is very large and does not fit into the pdf outputs in my client's workflow.

Is there something like "bitmapMode" available in the MDK like in Fiori mobile? See: https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/guides/features/fiori-ui/android/compose/signaturecapture-inline.html

It doesn't appear that there is any option in the MDK documentation: https://help.sap.com/doc/3642933ef2e1478fb1578ef2acba4ae9/Latest/en-US/reference/schemadoc/Page/FormCell/InlineSignatureCapture.schema.html

Any assistance you can provide would be great.

entry.title: Issue in the Building SAP Asset Manager Client2405(Could not find com.sap.cloud.android:fiori:7.1.8)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I'm trying to build SAP Service and Asset Manager client 2405 for Android on Windows 11 but I get an "Error: Failed to run ns build android" with below error. Could anyone please provide some insights or suggestions to resolve this issue?

using versions -
1. SAM Metadata 2405 - (ASSETMGRMD240500P_4-80009241)
2. MDK Plugin-SDK (SAM Extensions) 2405.0.4 - (MDKPLG_SDK_AND00P_4-80008901)

3. MDK 24.4.3 - (MDKCLNT23808P_7-80008652 (2))
4. ASSTMGRBRNDSDK00P_4-80008827


Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

SAP BTP, Kyma runtime SAP Field Service Management SAP Maintenance Assistant mobile app mobile development kit client SAP Mobile Asset Management SAP Mobile Services SAP ERP, add-on for mobile integration

entry.title: Failed to get OData service metadata document. Please enable Cross Context SSO setting under Securit
entry.content: Hi expert i m facing this problem, today when i try to update de metada document in my mdk app.

entry.title: same issuse i am facing will you find the solution plz share
entry.content: Failed to get OData service metadata document. Please enable Cross Context SSO setting under Security in your mobile services app configuration and try again.  in mdk development using btp

entry.title: Unable to proceed on MDK Annotations
entry.content:
I have been following the SAP MDK Documentations. I am stuck at the annotations (intermediate) level. When creating annotation i get the following error in BTP IDE.

"Command failed: yo @ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel/mdk:newEntity --data "/tmp/.mdk_anno_config.json" --force ✖ An error occured while running @ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel/mdk:newEntity#writing Error @ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel/mdk:newEntity --data /tmp/.mdk_anno_config.json --force When copying multiple files, provide a directory as destination TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: The "code" argument must be of type number. Received type string ('ERR_ASSERTION') at process.set [as exitCode] (node:internal/bootstrap/node:123:9) at process.exit (node:internal/process/per_thread:182:24) at onError (/managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/yo@4.3.1_mem-fs@2.3.0/node_modules/yo/lib/cli.js:117:11) at /managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/yo@4.3.1_mem-fs@2.3.0/node_modules/yo/lib/cli.js:165:48"

If i try to create a new entity using npm i get : 

✖ An error occured while running @ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel/mdk:newEntity#writing
Error @ext-mdkvsc-npm-rel/mdk:newEntity --data /tmp/.mdk_anno_config.json --force

When copying multiple files, provide a directory as destination
TypeError [ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE]: The "code" argument must be of type number. Received type string ('ERR_ASSERTION')
at process.set [as exitCode] (node:internal/bootstrap/node:123:9)
at process.exit (node:internal/process/per_thread:182:24)
at onError (/managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/yo@4.3.1_mem-fs@2.3.0/node_modules/yo/lib/cli.js:117:11)
at /managed-content/globals/pnpm/5/.pnpm/yo@4.3.1_mem-fs@2.3.0/node_modules/yo/lib/cli.js:165:48


Any suggestions would he really helpful since i am new to SAP.

entry.title: sap BTP MDK deployee the changes every time i am getting the Failed to initialize application data
entry.content:
in my mobile application after refreshing i am getting the error that 

Failed to initialize application data service - Error: [-10340] The download failed due to an error on the server: -857 (SERVER_SYNCHRONIZATION_ERROR) ([-10225] and the navigvation to the list page but data will not been displayed at why?

entry.title: SAP BTP MDK I am getting delta download for an offline odata client failed
entry.content: SAP BTP MDK I am getting delta download for an offline odata client failed. How to resolve can some one help me

entry.title: SAP Asset Manager - delta sync ignoring syclo changes sent by transport
entry.content:
I have noticed when

  • I change syclo configuration (/SYCLO/CONFIGPANEL ODATA -> Data Filter),
  • save changes to request,
  • transport request to Test system,
  • on mobile device perform delta synchronization, data are not synced correctly. New changes in the Data filter are not applied.

When I modify data on test system, delta synchronization will work. But If I do not change data but only changes in syclo were made, delta synchronization will not send data by current filter settings.

For example: Notifications => Item => Part group (list picker values) does not update values after delta sync. But if I reset the application and perform the initial full synchronization => list picker gets the correct current values.

I this correct behaviour of delta sync or am I missing something in syclo configuration?

entry.title: Created an event in MDK project after that deleted the page getting error don't find reference file
entry.content: Created an event in MDK project after that deleted the page getting error don't find reference file how to overcome the error

entry.title: how to configure custom v2 service in the mobile connectivity in mdk application
entry.content: how to configure custom v2 service in the mobile connectivity in mdk application.it was throwing error that url contains invalid characters my service is /sap/opu/odata/SAP/Zapp_dfrt_SRV/abced.

entry.title: i am using custom v2 service mdk after that i am getting HTTP status from the back end is 508
entry.content: am using custom v2 service for btp mdk after that i am getting HTTP status from the back end is 508 error. checked the logs in that .error message is Failed to access backend with error Request failed with status code 508, please check your destination in SAP Mobile Services cockpit..

entry.title: custom v2 service in mdk mobile connectivity destination throwing error
entry.content:
here is my service : http://host:port/sap/opu/odata/SAP/ZDEMO_MDK_SRV/v2 in mobile connectivity destination 

i had checked in the logs the error will be :The host name http://host:port/sap/opu/odata/SAP/ZDEMO_MDK_SRV/$metadata is unknown 

how to resolve it when i try to create project in btp it was throwing error that : Error: Failed to access backend with error Request failed with status code 502, please check your destination in SAP Mobile Services cockpit
